free_text: The Combined Target and Ion Source Osiris
Was Used. The Reactor Fast Neutron Flux was About
10**11 N/(CM2 S). A Chosen Mass Beam was Directed
Towards a Mylar Tape at a Collection Position.
The Tape was Moved Out to a Measurement Position
Where a Ge(LI) Detector was Used.
Data Taken from Table 1 of Main Reference.
.Data Units in San 002-037 Corrected to No-Dim
And Data Values Diminished in 100 Times
